best_bet.reason: Shorter thunderstorm window (9-11am instead of 9am-noon) and moderate rip current risk instead of high, plus calmer 1-2 ft surf make it the safer bet if you're timing a morning beach visit.

counties.name: Horry County
counties.beaches: Myrtle Beach · North Myrtle Beach · Surfside Beach · Garden City
